label: The Notched Pledge
description: The Notched Pledge operates as a licensed weapon shop set into a narrow ground-floor bay of salvaged ashlar beneath newer brickwork typical of Varric Holdfast’s refounded wards. Iron grilles, stamped with registry marks, separate the public counter from wall-racks of polearms and bundled crossbow staves, with hazard placards posted beside the measuring rail for blade lengths. The interior is lit by hooded lantern niches that throw hard light across whetstones, oil tins, and numbered storage hooks, reinforcing the city’s preference for traceable goods. A recessed alcove holds lockable strongboxes and a ledger desk for purchase bonds and custody slips, reflecting the Holdfast’s codified trade discipline.
